intent_summary: Create a premium ecommerce image for a skincare serum bottle.

case_retrieval_plan.query_text: premium ecommerce skincare serum hero image studio lighting

selected_cases.title: Premium product hero image with dramatic studio lighting
selected_cases.why_selected: Matches ecommerce product hero composition, premium lighting, and commercial use case.

prompt_plan.prompt: Create a premium ecommerce hero image for a matte white skincare serum bottle on a minimal studio set...
prompt_plan.negative_prompt: avoid distorted packaging, unreadable text, copied logos, celebrity faces, protected characters

reasons: Reference cases used for visual structure only.

case_retrieval_plan.query_text: premium ecommerce skincare serum hero image studio lighting

orchestrator_decision.final_prompt: Create a premium ecommerce hero image for a matte white skincare serum bottle on a minimal studio set. Use centered product hierarchy, soft clinical-luxury key light, subtle rim highlights, controlled negative space for landing-page copy, clean ivory and pale gold tones, refined glass reflections, accurate packaging geometry, and a polished commercial finish. Treat the selected case only as abstract evidence for composition and lighting; do not copy its product, brand marks, text, props, or layout.
orchestrator_decision.negative_prompt: crowded background, copied logo, celebrity face, protected character, unreadable text, distorted packaging, low-resolution artifacts, direct reference reproduction
orchestrator_decision.prompt_rationale: Claude selected the case for product hierarchy and studio lighting, then rewrote the final prompt around the user's skincare serum.

prompt_directives.visual_strategy: premium skincare hero image with soft clinical luxury
prompt_directives.case_selection_rationale: Claude selected the case for product hierarchy, studio lighting, and ecommerce composition.
prompt_directives.composition: centered product hero with copy-safe margin
prompt_directives.lighting: soft studio key light with rim highlights
prompt_directives.color_palette: warm white, pale gold, clean shadow
safety_notes: use cases as visual structure only

stage_commands.reason: Local retrieval provides evidence; Claude makes final selection.

next_actions: Let the user select a favorite output or request revisions.
